channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Experimental treatment could ease ‘misunderstood’ dementia symptom - National - Global News
item.description:
1. Experimental treatment could ease ‘misunderstood’ dementia symptom - National  Global News
  2. Baycrest Research Highlights Overlooked Condition Affecting People with Advanced Dementia  Newswire Canada
  3. Paratonia remains underrecognized in advanced dementia care, research finds  Benefits and Pensions Monitor
  4. Experimental treatment could ease ‘misunderstood’ dementia symptom  unpublished.ca
  5. Patients suffering from dementia symptom, paratonia, may find relief in Botox  Yahoo News Canada
